title: I want to know how to collect and analyze answers i am getting based on a questioner i am sending via Monday out side of my organization
excerpt: I’m sending a questioner (52 questions )  form to a clients . once the clients submits their answers its automatically update Monday. My question is how can i later on analyze those questions
